steps.title: Spot the contextual signal
steps.content: The sentence after the blank lists three different perspectives: the mother's, the father's, and the daughter's. Each section is from a different person — separate, individual viewpoints.

steps.title: Match to a synonym for "separate/different"
steps.content:
A (unknown) and B (unintended) don't fit — these are deliberate, named viewpoints. C (required) doesn't capture the multiplicity.

D (distinct) means clearly separate or different — exactly the relationship between the three perspectives. D is correct.
